title: paracynoglossum asperrimum
intro: Paracynoglossum asperrimum, also known as rough bugloss, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Europe, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paracynoglossum asperrimum include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
